prevalence.value: 10-20% (older adults; higher in frail and autonomic disease)

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Orthostatic BP criteria with evaluation for causes and medication contributors

publicHealthSystem.screeningCoverage: variable; orthostatic vitals used in many geriatric pathways
publicHealthSystem.estimatedPatients: tens of millions of older adults
publicHealthSystem.controlRate: Moderate with medication review and non-pharmacologic interventions

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Integrated falls/syncope pathways in many systems
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Hydration, compression, medication adjustment; pharmacotherapy for refractory cases in specialist care
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Strong guideline-based syncope/falls management in many systems
